title: India Ratings is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: India Ratings is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
India Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About India Ratings:
India Ratings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Ratings!
